overview.tagline: A family-centered township with excellent schools, beautiful parks, and a strong community identity
overview.description: The Township of Washington, often referred to as Washington Township to distinguish it from other Washingtons in New Jersey, is a thriving residential community in central Bergen County. Known for its top-rated Westwood Regional School District, well-maintained parks, and active recreation programs, the township attracts families seeking a suburban lifestyle with excellent services. Washington Township offers a mix of housing options and a central Bergen County location with convenient access to shopping and highways.
highlights: Excellent Westwood Regional School District shared with Westwood
Well-maintained parks and extensive recreation programs
Central Bergen County location near Westwood's walkable downtown
Family-oriented community with active civic organizations
Mix of housing options from starter homes to executive properties

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties are assessed by the Bergen County Tax Assessor's office. Washington Township offers a diverse housing stock ranging from Cape Cods and ranches to larger Colonial and custom homes.
realEstate.recentTrends: Washington Township has seen strong price appreciation driven by demand for homes in the Westwood Regional School District. The market is competitive with families drawn by the combination of school quality, open space, and relative affordability compared to some neighboring towns.
neighborhoodNotes: Pascack Road area — Established neighborhood along the main north-south route
Ridgewood Road section — Homes near the Westwood border with easy downtown access
Washington Avenue area — Mix of housing styles and sizes
Pascack Brook area — Properties near the scenic brook and parkland
Northern section — Larger lots and newer construction near Woodcliff Lake

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup is provided weekly by a contracted hauler for all residential properties.
details: Weekly trash collection on designated days by neighborhood zone
Trash must be placed curbside by 6:00 AM on collection day
Use approved containers with secure lids
Bulk item pickup available by appointment through DPW
Holiday schedule adjustments posted on township website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Curbside recycling is collected on a regular schedule.
details: Commingled recyclables collected on designated days
Paper and cardboard collected separately
Yard waste collected seasonally from April through November
Recycling bins available from the township
Electronics recycling through Bergen County programs

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water is supplied by Veolia Water and sewer service is maintained by the Township.
details: Water supplied by Veolia Water / Suez
Sewer service maintained by Township DPW
Quarterly billing for water and sewer
Water quality reports published annually
Emergency water repairs available 24/7

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits and zoning compliance.
details: Building permits required for construction and renovations
Zoning applications reviewed by the Planning Board and Board of Adjustment
Permit applications available at Township Hall and online
Inspections scheduled through the Building Department
Certificate of Occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Parking in Washington Township is primarily residential, with limited municipal facilities.
details: Street parking available in residential areas
Commuter parking available at the Westwood NJ Transit station (nearby)
Snow emergency parking bans enforced
Overnight parking restrictions on certain streets
Parking available at township facilities during business hours

additionalServices.title: Washington Township Public Library
additionalServices.description: Full-service public library serving the community with books, digital resources, and programs.
details: Located at 144 Woodfield Road
Children's programs, teen activities, and adult enrichment
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)
Free Wi-Fi, computer access, and community meeting space

additionalServices.title: Recreation Department
additionalServices.description: Year-round recreational programs for township residents of all ages.
details: Youth sports leagues and summer camps
Adult fitness classes and senior programs
Community events and seasonal celebrations
Facilities at township parks and fields

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Washington Township enforces noise regulations to preserve residential quality of life.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 7:00 PM on weekdays
Saturday construction allowed 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM only
No construction noise permitted on Sundays or federal holidays
Leaf blowers and power equipment restricted to daytime hours
Loud music and amplified sound restricted after 10:00 PM

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners must maintain their properties in good condition.
keyRules: Lawns must be maintained and grass kept at a reasonable height
Sidewalk snow removal required within 24 hours after snowfall
Fences must comply with height and setback requirements
Abandoned vehicles must be removed from property
Property exteriors must be maintained in good repair

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Washington Township requires dog licensing and enforces leash laws.
keyRules: All dogs over 7 months must be licensed annually with proof of rabies vaccination
Dogs must be leashed on all public property
Pet waste must be picked up immediately
Excessive barking subject to complaints and enforcement
No exotic or wild animals permitted as pets

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking is regulated on township streets for safety and access.
keyRules: No overnight parking on township streets between 2:00 AM and 6:00 AM
Snow emergency parking bans enforced
Commercial vehicles prohibited from parking on residential streets overnight
No parking within 25 feet of intersections
Handicapped parking violations subject to fines

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must comply with township housing and safety codes.
keyRules: Rental properties must meet housing code standards
Certificate of Occupancy required before rental occupancy
Landlords responsible for property maintenance
Fire safety inspections for multi-family units
Short-term rentals subject to township regulations

other.title: Environmental Protection
other.summary: Washington Township maintains ordinances to protect its natural areas and waterways.
keyRules: Buffer zones required along Pascack Brook and tributaries
Stormwater management plans required for significant development
Tree removal permits may be required for significant trees
Wetland areas protected by state and local regulations

publicSchools.name: Westwood Regional High School
publicSchools.notes: Regional high school shared with Westwood; strong academics, athletics, and extracurriculars

publicSchools.name: Westwood Regional Middle School
publicSchools.notes: Regional middle school serving Washington Township and Westwood students

publicSchools.name: Washington School
publicSchools.notes: Washington Township's elementary school serving local students through grade 6

privateSchools.name: Immaculate Heart Academy
privateSchools.notes: All-girls Catholic college-preparatory high school located in Washington Township

privateSchools.name: St. Andrew's Academy
privateSchools.notes: Catholic parish school serving the local community

nearbyHigherEd: Ramapo College of New Jersey (Mahwah) — 20 minutes

whyMoveHere: Well-maintained parks and active recreation programs
Family-friendly neighborhoods with diverse housing options
Central Bergen County location near Westwood's downtown
Strong sense of community and civic engagement

commuteToNYC.primaryMethod: NJ Transit Bus / Drive to Westwood train station
commuteToNYC.notes: Washington Township residents can walk or drive to the Westwood NJ Transit station for Main/Bergen County Line train service to Hoboken. NJ Transit bus service is also available via Routes 165 and 175. The total commute to Manhattan is approximately 50-70 minutes depending on mode and connections.

costOfLiving.summary: Washington Township offers a moderate cost of living for Bergen County, with housing prices that provide good value relative to the quality of schools and community amenities.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Approximately 30% above the New Jersey state average

pros: Highly regarded Westwood Regional School District
Excellent parks, recreation, and community programs
Diverse housing options at various price points
Proximity to Westwood's walkable downtown for dining and shopping
cons: No NJ Transit station within the township (Westwood station nearby)
Property taxes are significant by national standards
Limited commercial district within the township itself
Some areas experience traffic on Pascack Road
Older housing stock in some neighborhoods may require updates

restaurants.name: Esty Street
restaurants.description: Contemporary American restaurant offering seasonal farm-to-table menus, craft cocktails, and a stylish atmosphere.

restaurants.name: La Vecchia Ristorante
restaurants.description: Family-owned Italian restaurant serving traditional pasta, veal, and seafood dishes in an elegant setting.

restaurants.name: Sun Hee's Kitchen
restaurants.description: Popular Korean restaurant offering authentic bibimbap, BBQ, and traditional Korean dishes.

parks.name: Memorial Field
parks.description: Township's primary recreation area featuring sports fields, a running track, playground, and community gathering space.

parks.name: Pascack Brook County Park
parks.description: Bergen County park along the scenic Pascack Brook offering walking trails, nature observation, and peaceful green space.

parks.name: Washington Township Community Park
parks.description: Neighborhood park with playground, basketball courts, and open fields.

events.name: Washington Township Day
events.description: Annual community celebration with food, rides, games, live music, and activities for all ages.

events.name: Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Annual ceremony and parade honoring veterans and fallen service members.
events.when: Memorial Day, last Monday in May

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community holiday celebration with tree lighting, caroling, and seasonal festivities.

attractions.name: Westwood Downtown (adjacent)
attractions.description: The walkable downtown of neighboring Westwood offers dozens of restaurants, shops, and cafes just minutes from Washington Township.

attractions.name: Pascack Brook Greenway
attractions.description: Scenic trails along Pascack Brook connecting parks and natural areas, ideal for walking and nature appreciation.

shoppingAreas: Westwood downtown — Restaurants, shops, and cafes just across the border
Pascack Road — Local businesses and services
Washington Avenue — Retail and dining options
Garden State Plaza (Paramus) — Major mall a short drive away

government.meetingSchedule: Township Committee meets the 2nd and 4th Monday of each month at 7:30 PM
government.meetingLocation: Township Hall, 350 Hudson Avenue, Washington Township, NJ 07676

hospitals.name: Valley Hospital (Valley Health System)
hospitals.address: 223 North Van Dien Avenue, Ridgewood, NJ 07450

importantNumbers.label: Bergen County Office of Emergency Management
